import numpy as np

def predict(frame, action):
    out = frame.copy()

    # --- Avatar: 3x3 block (body=9, direction marker=4) in one of two slots ---
    # left slot  = rows 15-17, cols 15-17   (faces left:  marker at [16,15])
    # right slot = rows 15-17, cols 21-23   (faces right: marker at [16,23])
    def active(r0, c0):
        blk = out[r0:r0+3, c0:c0+3]
        return bool(np.any(blk == 9) or np.any(blk == 4))

    left_active = active(15, 15)
    right_active = active(15, 21)

    if action == 3:        # move to LEFT slot (only if coming from right slot)
        if right_active and not left_active:
            out[15:18, 21:24] = 0
            out[15:18, 15:18] = 9
            out[16, 15] = 4
    elif action == 4:      # move to RIGHT slot (only if coming from left slot)
        if left_active and not right_active:
            out[15:18, 15:18] = 0
            out[15:18, 21:24] = 9
            out[16, 23] = 4
    # actions 1 and 2 do not modify the avatar (no-op when already in slot)

    # --- Bar at row 63: remove the rightmost color-6 cell ---
    bar_idx = np.where(out[63] == 6)[0]
    if bar_idx.size > 0:
        out[63, bar_idx[-1]] = 0

    return out
